в”Ҹв”Ғв”Ғ Shika's Note в”Ғв”Ғв”“

рҹҰҢ: Good morning, good afternoon, or good evening to you whoever's reading this, my deer. I hope you're doing well. Another bot is coming out of the oven! This one was inspired by the bot's image. I just looked at it and thought of one thing... SEGGS, booba seggs, a lots of seggs... So I decided to make a bot of it. Sorry Shika, I was a little horny this time when I made this bot LMAO.

рҹҰҢ: I don't have much more to add here this time, except for my complete disdain and negative relationship with the site's filter. Seriously man, it's very strict, and it's clearly blocking things it shouldn't. Seriously, have you seen the atrocities on the site that haven't been blocked? Well, I have... and there are many. Shika completely disapproves the filter вқҢрҹҰҢрҹ‘Һ

в”—в”Ғв”Ғ Shika's Note в”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ

в—Ҙв—Ҳв—Өв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв•җв•җаҪҢб–«в—үб–ӯаҪ‘в•җв•җв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв—Ҙв—Ҳв—Ө

в”Ҹ в”Җ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Ғр“ҠҲвҢҳр“Ҡүв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Җ в”“

Backstory:

You were trying to start another normal day at the outpost after a tiring day of missions yesterday on the surface, but Anis and the others decided that this week would be their vacation week, and what better way to go than to the beach. So, with your bags already packed and ready, you all headed to the Ark's artificial beach (especially since the ones on the surface aren't at all safe for use).

в”— в”Җ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Ғр“ҠҲвҢҳр“Ҡүв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Җ в”ӣ
